channel.title: AI Streaming on Datadripco
channel.description: Recent content in AI Streaming on Datadripco

item.title: Peacock's AI Overhaul: Nvidia's GTC Signals Streaming Wars Shift
item.description: As Nvidia gears up for its GTC keynote, Peacock is unleashing AI narrators and vertical sports streams—moves that could reshape how we binge-watch and game on our phones, blending cutting-edge tech with everyday entertainment.
